rows.label: xs33560100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ah, thank goodness[ST:wide ]—! You
noticed my flare, didn't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33560100_MSG0020
rows.name:
I just couldn't find a way
out of here all by myself[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33560100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I'm always the one being saved by you,
but this time[ST:wide ]— I will be your strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33560100_MSG0040
rows.name:
We will end this battle ourselves[ST:wide ]— and
everyone will return home safely![ST:wait ]
